description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages docker, lint, automation, and deploy. Add a docker:ruby job in the docker stage that uses the docker:git image with the docker:dind service, sets IMAGE=ruby, runs only on the main branch when docker/ruby/Dockerfile or docker/build change (excluding schedules), and executes ./docker/build "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${IMAGE}" docker/${IMAGE}/Dockerfile. Add a lint:vale job in the lint stage using the registry.gitlab.com/inko-lang/development-docker-images:vale image, runs only when source/**/*.html.md files change (excluding schedules), runs vale --version in before_script and then vale --no-wrap --sort source/. Add a sponsors job in the automation stage using the registry.gitlab.com/inko-lang/website:ruby image, caches the vendor directory, runs ruby, gem, and bundle version checks, configures bundle path to vendor, installs gems, runs only on scheduled pipelines when the $UPDATE_SPONSORS variable is set, and executes ./scripts/sponsors.sh. Finally, add a deploy job in the deploy stage using the same ruby image, caches vendor, sets a production environment at https://inko-lang.org with AWS_DEFAULT_REGION, BUCKET, and DISTRIBUTION_ID variables, runs only on the main branch of inko-lang/website, runs ruby, gem, and bundle version checks, configures bundle path vendor, installs gems, and runs rake deploy to publish the site.
